title: groov e Digital Buds - Wired In-Ear Earphones with Remote & Mic - USB-C Connection - Music Playback & Hands-Free Calls - Includes Earbuds (3x Sizes) - Black
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: WIRED EARPHONES - Fun and stylish earphones that deliver a memorable sound experience while offering an updated input method for modern devices, the Groov-e Digital Buds will equally impress when you're jamming to your tunes or taking an importing call

DIGITAL SOUND - These in-ear earphones utilize digital sound to immerse you in amazing audio quality that will have you listening to music, streaming your favourite show, catching up on a podcast, or chatting with a mate for hours on end

USB-C CONNECTION - A modern adaption for modern devices that no longer support Audio Jacks, the Digital Buds offer a unique solution for a wired audio experience with a USB-C connection suited for connecting to compatible smartphones, tablets and laptops

IN-LINE CONTROL - Take control of your music with the press of a button with the in-line remote that also features a built-in mic that lets you enjoy hands-free calling and enables the use of compatible voice assistants

COMFORT FIT - The Digital buds are shaped to sit snuggly in your ear so whether you're using them for a 20-minute commute or an entire day while working, you have a comfortable experience with every minute of use
